payload.answer: The table presents two PPO runs: PPO-001 (baseline) with reward 0.12 and Sharpe 0.45, and PPO-002 (entropy-tuned) with reward 0.18 and Sharpe 0.51. PPO-002 outperformed PPO-001 in both metrics due to entropy tuning.

entity_resolution.reason: Explicit comparison between runs PPO-001 and PPO-002 is required for performance analysis.

memory_cards.statement: PPO-001 achieved a reward of 0.12 and a Sharpe ratio of 0.45, serving as the baseline run.
PPO-002 achieved a reward of 0.18 and a Sharpe ratio of 0.51, with entropy tuning applied.
PPO-002 outperformed PPO-001 in both reward (0.18 vs. 0.12) and Sharpe ratio (0.51 vs. 0.45), attributed to entropy tuning.
